top_signals.title: How long can oil markets absorb the Hormuz shock?
top_signals.summary: Improvements in oil intensity have cushioned the global economy so far — but could prompt reckless political choices
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Trezor exec pushes back on ZachXBT claim that hardware wallets are ‘complete garbage’
top_signals.summary: "I do not advise using them for important tasks like signing transactions or storing funds," ZachXBT wrote this week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
